description: Finishing move that consumes your Deadly Poison doses on the target and deals instant poison damage. One dose is consumed for each combo point: 1 dose: (180 + attackPower * 0.03) damage 2 doses: (180 * 2 + attackPower * 0.06) damage 3 doses: (180 * 3 + attackPower * 0.09) damage 4 doses: (180 * 4 + attackPower * 0.12) damage 5 doses: (180 * 5 + attackPower * 0.15) damage
name: Envenom
